# Sample author mapping for svn2git tests
# Format: svnusername = Full Name <email@example.com>

jsmith = John Smith <john.smith@example.com>
mmustermann = Max Mustermann <max.mustermann@example.com>
akowalska = Anna Kowalska <anna.kowalska@example.com>

# Build/automation accounts
buildbot = Build Bot <buildbot@ci.example.com>
